capability_results.summary: Read callable fixture snapshot for 'CodeFriend Review Packet Draft' at revision 'workspace-revision-42'.
Loaded the tracked content-card set through the native fixture API without requiring live Workspace access.
Prepared a Git-backed promotion handoff for 'CodeFriend Review Packet Draft' with exact tracked packet consistency=true.
Applied callable fixture-only update for 'doc-review-packet-demo' with live persistence=false.
Live Workspace writes remain gated behind explicit operator approval and governed-tools semantics.

write_scope_summary: single-range content-card write scope only after preview and operator approval
prohibited_default_behaviors: No live Workspace write during fixture validation.
No direct tracked repo edits from Workspace state.
No private document body export into public artifacts by default.

recommendation.summary: Implement the callable typed fixture-first CMS boundary now, and keep live secret-bearing Workspace writes deferred behind governed-tools semantics.
rationale: WP-09 now exposes callable native operations for folder inventory, document snapshot, content-card reads, promotion packet preparation, preview, and bounded fixture apply.
This gives ADL a bounded CMS capability for draft lifecycle management without promoting Workspace to canonical truth.
Live external writes remain the only intentionally deferred part of the CMS capability surface.

non_claims: This report does not prove live authenticated Google Workspace execution.
This report does not make Google Workspace canonical repo truth.
This report does not authorize direct tracked repository mutation from Workspace state.
